titleStmt.title: SII 30.86: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 86. (A.R. No. 163 of 1915.) Kiḻputtūr, Wandiwash Taluk, North Arcot District Svayambhunāthasvāmi temple-on the north and west walls of the central shrine Kulōttuṅga-Chōḻa: year 6: 12th c. A.D.

summary.p: Unfinished. This inscription records a gift of land (2050 kuḻi,) by purchase to the temple of Tirukkumārīsvaramuḍaiyār at Irukkalāmputtūr in Poṉṉūr-nāḍu, a sub division of Veṇkuṉṟa-kkōṭṭam, a sub-division of Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam by certain Nālāyiravaṉ Sīvālaya santōḻaṉ Seṅkēṇi Ammaiyappaṉ, for the midnight offerings. This gifted land includes 1000 kuḻi of land at Aḍaichcheṟuvu and Pūvaṅgaḻuval, 120 kuḻi of land at Maṇikuṇḍu, 250 kuḻi of land at Pullānti, 450 kuḻi of land at Perumaṇali, 180 kuḻi of land at Nīr Nāval Kuṇḍu and Aḻiñjil Kuṇḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: svastiśrī . kolottuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 6 Āṟāvatu jeyaṅ koṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟak koṭṭattu poṉnūr nāṭṭu Irukkalāmputtūr Āḷuṭaiyār tirukkumārīśvaramuṭaiyārkku nālāiravan civālaiyacantoḻaṉ ceṅkeṇi Ammaiyappan tiruvottaRead- tiruvarttacāmamcāmattukku Ivvūrār pakkal nāṉ poṉṉiṭṭu koṇṭa nilam m Aṭaicceṟuvum pūvaṅkaḻuvalum Āyiramum maṇi kuṇṭil kuḻi 100 2 10 pullānti kuḻi 2 100 5 10 m perumaṇali kuḻi 4 100 5 10 m nirnāval kuṇṭilum Aḻiñcil kuṇṭilum kuḻi 100 8 10 Āṭukaliyum ponṉaṟak koṇṭu maṇṇaṟa viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Ivvūrom Ittevarkku viṟṟu
Digital edition of SII 30.86 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
